# TNE (Terra Nova Electromotive)

## About
TNE (Terra Nova Electromotive) provides agile, sustainable, and reliable EV solutions for New Zealand agriculture.
We specialize in custom-built electric machinery for orchards, maximizing efficiency without damaging trees.

## Key Offerings
- Custom Built Machinery: Tailor-made for your orchard's specific needs.
- Unified Energy Platform: Seamless integration with existing systems.
- Local Support: Dedicated support team in New Zealand.
- LFP Battery Technology: Safe, long-lasting, and efficient power.

## Contact
Website: https://greendrive.co.nz
